properties.title: Modern Apartment in Upper Hill
properties.description: A well-positioned apartment suitable for professionals and small families looking for convenience, security and access to Nairobi business districts.

properties.title: Spacious Living Room in Modern Two-Bedroom House
properties.description: A bright, spacious living room in a modern two-bedroom house, featuring large windows, clean tiled floors, modern ceiling finishes, and a well-arranged open layout. Ideal for families, couples, or professionals seeking a comfortable home with quality finishes, entertainment space, natural lighting, and reliable management support.

properties.title: Elegant 4-Bedroom Maisonette in Own Compound
properties.description:
An elegant and spacious four-bedroom maisonette set in a private own compound, designed for families and professionals looking for comfort, space, privacy, and modern living. The home features a beautiful exterior, spacious living room, well-lit bedrooms, modern kitchen and dining area, quality finishes, and a neatly maintained compound.

Key Features
Spacious 4-bedroom maisonette
Private own compound
Large living room with modern finishes
Master bedroom with fitted wardrobes

properties.title: Modern Studio Apartments for Sale in Utawala
properties.description: Modern self-contained studio apartments for sale in Utawala at KES 2,500,000 per unit. Each unit features a fitted kitchenette, private bathroom, wardrobe space, tiled floors, and good natural lighting. Ideal for first-time buyers, students, young professionals, or investors seeking affordable rental income.

properties.title: Spacious 5-Bedroom House for Rent in Nyali, Mombasa
properties.description: Spacious 5-bedroom house for rent in Nyali, Mombasa, ideal for families looking for comfort, privacy, and convenient coastal living. The house features large rooms, a spacious living area, fitted kitchen, modern bathrooms, ample parking, and a secure compound close to schools, shopping centres, hospitals, and beach access.
